EPISODE 1

COLD OPEN

INT. RICK'S CAFÉ AMÉRICAIN - NIGHT

A man in a trench coat enters. The piano player pauses.

RICK
Of all the gin joints, in all the towns, in all the world...

END COLD OPEN

ACT 1

INT. RICK'S CAFÉ - NIGHT

Ilsa walks in. Rick recognizes her.

ILSA
Hello, Rick.

RICK
Hello, Ilsa.

CUT TO: S01E02 RECAP - INT. PARIS APARTMENT - 1940

ILSA
Will you help me?

RICK
Yes.

CUT TO: S01E02 - EXT. PARIS STREET - NIGHT

They embrace. German soldiers march past.

TAG

INT. RICK'S CAFÉ - LATER

Rick drinks alone.

ACT 2

INT. RICK'S APARTMENT - NIGHT

Ilsa explains. Rick is torn.

ILSA
Victor Laszlo is alive. I need those letters of transit.

RICK
I know how much you love him.

CUT TO: S01E03 PREVIEW - EXT. AIRPORT - DAWN

A plane prepares for takeoff.

END ACT 2

TAG

INT. RICK'S CAFÉ - DAWN

Rick and Renault walk out.

RENAULT
This is the beginning of a beautiful friendship.

— 角色表 —
RICK ──── 主角
ILSA ──── 主角
RENAULT ──── 配角
VICTOR LASZLO ──── 客串（预告）

— 集场统计 —
EPISODE: 1
COLD OPEN: 1
ACT: 2 (1 + 2)
TAG: 2
CUT TO: 3
SxxExx 跨集引用: 2 (S01E02, S01E03)
